turn.content: Ten minutes? To choose... to choose who dies? Oh no, oh no, please, we have to talk! Ma'am, are you listening? We can't just... we can't just let this happen! My wife, she's waiting for me at home, I can't just... I can't be the one to die! Can

Wait a second, my wife is waiting for me too, and I have a root canal scheduled in an hour! This isn't fair, and I refuse to just sit here and accept some twisted game without a say! Are you hearing me? We need a real plan, not just panic!

A root canal? Yes, yes, absolutely, but look at that hammer! He's going to crush us both if we don't decide now! I'm so sorry, ma'am, but... but maybe you should be the one to live? My dog needs me, but your life... it seems so important too. Please,

Wait a minute, are you suggesting  want me to die? Who gave you the right to decide that for yourself?! I just got my new car last week, and I'm not about to be sacrificed just because you have a dog! We need to talk about this properly, not just... not just this immediate plea!
